component.name: Friday
component.summary: Local AI Assistant that runs 100% offline on your device

description.p: Ultimate Local AI Assistant that takes actions for you. Our goal is to make your life easy and let your assistant do all work accurately for you.

ul.li: Model Library with popular LLMs like Llama, Gemma, Mistral, or Qwen
Connect to Remote AI APIs like Groq and OpenRouter
Local API Server with OpenAI-equivalent API

description.p: Latest stable release of Friday AI
